## Summary

What architecture decision is being proposed or documented?

## Context

What problem or constraint drives this decision?

| A | | | |

| C | | | |

## Decision

What is the proposed decision?

## Scope

- Which modules/packages are affected?
- What code changes are implied?

## Non-Scope

- What is explicitly NOT part of this decision?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] ADR documented in `docs/adr/` following ADR format
- [ ] Alternatives evaluated with pros/cons
- [ ] Dependency/coupling impact analyzed
- [ ] Rollback strategy documented (if applicable)

## Evidence

- Dependency graph analysis
- Performance benchmarks (if applicable)
- Compatibility analysis

## Risk Classification

```text
RISK: YELLOW_REVIEW (architecture decisions default to YELLOW)
TYPE: type:architecture
```

## Local Gates

- [ ] ADR follows standard format
- [ ] All alternatives documented
- [ ] No code implemented (decision only)

## Owner Decision Needed?

- [ ] Yes — architecture decisions require owner approval
